phrases.text_local: Recomenda um restaurante típico perto do hotel?
phrases.pronunciation: reh-koo-MAYNG-duh OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih TEE-pee-koo PEHR-too DOO oo-TEHL?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao Gestor do mercado ou a um vendedor local; eles conhecem bem a região.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW zhihsh-TOHR DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo OHW AH OONNG vayng-dih-DOHR loo-KAHL; EH-lihsh koo-NYEH-sayng BAYNG AH reh-ZHEEOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the Market Manager or a local vendor; they know the area well.

responses.english: Ask the Market Manager or a local vendor; they know the area well.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW zhihsh-TOHR DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo OHW AH OONNG vayng-dih-DOHR loo-KAHL; EH-lihsh koo-NYEH-sayng BAYNG AH reh-ZHEEOWN.
responses.local: Pergunte ao Gestor do mercado ou a um vendedor local; eles conhecem bem a região.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy Pão de ló
phrases.text_local: Onde comprar pão de ló tradicional?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih koomp-RAHR POWN DIH LAW truh-dee-seeoo-NAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: Pão de ló is a traditional sponge cake, famous in the Óbidos region.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o Queijo de Óbidos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW KAY-zhoo DIH AW-bee-doosh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao vendedor ou ao gestor do mercado.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vayng-dih-DOHR OHW OW zhihsh-TOHR DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the vendor or the market manager.

responses.english: Ask the vendor or the market manager.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vayng-dih-DOHR OHW OW zhihsh-TOHR DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo.
responses.local: Pergunte ao vendedor ou ao gestor do mercado.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cured meat counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de enchidos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH ayng-SHEE-doosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Cured meats are a staple in Portuguese markets, often displayed openly for sampling.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy Pão de ló
phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar o Pão de ló?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR AW POWN DIH LAW?
phrases.cultural_note: Pão de ló is a traditional Portuguese sponge cake, often sold at deli counters in markets.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cheese section is
phrases.cultural_note: Local cheeses like Queijo de Óbidos are traditionally aged and sold by weight.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, pergunte a um vendedor.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG vayng-dih-DOHR.

responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG vayng-dih-DOHR.
responses.local: Bom dia, pergunte a um vendedor.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find ginjinha vendors
phrases.text_local: Bom dia, onde encontro os vendedores de ginjinha?
phrases.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, OHNG-dih ayng-KOHNGT-roo OOSH vayng-dih-DOH-rihsh DIH zheen-ZHEE-nyuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Ginjinha de Óbidos is a local cherry liqueur often served in edible chocolate cups.

likely_response.local: Na secção de licores, à esquerda.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH SEH-sown DIH lee-KOH-rihsh, AH SHKEH-ruh-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: In the liqueur section, on the left.

responses.english: In the liqueur section, on the left.
responses.phonetic: NUH SEH-sown DIH lee-KOH-rihsh, AH SHKEH-ruh-duh.
responses.local: Na secção de licores, à esquerda.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar queijo de Óbidos autêntico aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR KAY-zhoo DIH AW-bee-doosh ow-TAYNG-tee-koo uh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Recomendo falar com um vendedor na secção de queijos.
likely_response.pronunciation: reh-koo-MAYNG-doo fuh-LAHR KOHM OONNG vayng-dih-DOHR NUH SEH-sown DIH KAY-zhoosh.
likely_response.translation_en: I recommend speaking with a vendor at the cheese section.

responses.english: I recommend speaking with a vendor at the cheese section.
responses.phonetic: reh-koo-MAYNG-doo fuh-LAHR KOHM OONNG vayng-dih-DOHR NUH SEH-sown DIH KAY-zhoosh.
responses.local: Recomendo falar com um vendedor na secção de queijos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the fish counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza a secção de peixe?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH loo-kuh-LEE-zuh AH SEH-sown DIH PAY-shih?
phrases.cultural_note: Fresh seafood is a market highlight, with cash traditionally preferred here.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a secção de peixe.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SEH-sown DIH PAY-shih.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for the fish section.

responses.english: Follow the signs for the fish section.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SEH-sown DIH PAY-shih.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a secção de peixe.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where cured meats are sold
phrases.cultural_note: Enchidos are air-dried sausages, a staple of Portuguese charcuterie boards.

likely_response.local: Ao lado da banca do queijo regional.
likely_response.pronunciation: OW LAH-doo DUH BAHNNG-kuh DOO KAY-zhoo reh-zheeoo-NAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the stall is next to the cheese counter.

responses.english: Good morning, the stall is next to the cheese counter.
responses.phonetic: OW LAH-doo DUH BAHNNG-kuh DOO KAY-zhoo reh-zheeoo-NAHL.
responses.local: Ao lado da banca do queijo regional.
